overview: Bluegrass Functional Medicine provides integrative care focused on identifying and treating root causes of chronic conditions. Care is delivered through a collaborative team approach involving a physician, nurse, and health coach over a 6-9 month treatment course.
highlights: Multidisciplinary care team with physician, certified nurse, and health coach
Functional medicine approach to chronic disease and autoimmune conditions
Ongoing community support and group education classes
targetAudience: Patients seeking root cause resolution for chronic conditions and autoimmune diseases through functional medicine.
